codeChanges.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,54 @@
+name: NPMJS Release
+
+on:
+  release:
+    types: [published]
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+jobs:
+  publish:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    if: github.event.release.draft == false
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout release tag
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          ref: ${{ github.event.release.tag_name }}
+
+      - name: Setup Node
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: 22
+          registry-url: https://registry.npmjs.org
+
+      - name: Setup pnpm
+        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
+        with:
+          version: 10
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile
+
+      - name: Build package
+        run: pnpm build
+
+      - name: Publish to npmjs
+        env:
+          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
+          RELEASE_NAME: ${{ github.event.release.name }}
+          RELEASE_PRERELEASE: ${{ github.event.release.prerelease }}
+        run: |
+          if [ -z "$NODE_AUTH_TOKEN" ]; then
+            echo "NPM_TOKEN is not configured"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+          TAG="latest"
+          if [ "$RELEASE_PRERELEASE" = "true" ] || echo "$RELEASE_NAME" | grep -q '#{TEST}'; then
+            TAG="test"
+          fi
+
+          npm publish --access public --tag "$TAG"

-name: PR — Changes
-
-on:
-  pull_request:
-    types: [opened, synchronize, review_requested]
-  pull_request_review:
-    types: [submitted]
-
-permissions:
-  pull-requests: write
-
-jobs:
-  manage-pr-changed:
-    name: Manage PR-changed label
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-
-    steps:
-      - name: Ensure PR-changed label exists
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
-        with:
-          script: |
-            try {
-              await github.rest.issues.createLabel({
-                owner: context.repo.owner,
-                repo: context.repo.repo,
-                name: 'PR-changed',
-                color: 'F9D0C4',
-                description: 'PR has changes after creation or after review',
-              })
-            } catch (e) {
-              if (e.status === 422) {
-                await github.rest.issues.updateLabel({
-                  owner: context.repo.owner,
-                  repo: context.repo.repo,
-                  name: 'PR-changed',
-                  color: 'F9D0C4',
-                  description: 'PR has changes after creation or after review',
-                })
-              }
-            }
-
-      - name: Manage PR-changed label
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
-        with:
-          script: |
-            const prNumber = context.payload.pull_request?.number
-              ?? context.payload.review?.pull_request?.number
-              ?? context.payload.pull_request_review?.pull_request?.number
-
-            const eventName = context.eventName
-            const action = context.payload.action
-
-            console.log('Event:', eventName, action)
-
-            const addLabel = async () => {
-              try {
-                await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
-                  owner: context.repo.owner,
-                  repo: context.repo.repo,
-                  issue_number: prNumber,
-                  labels: ['PR-changed'],
-                })
-                console.log('Added: PR-changed')
-              } catch (e) { console.log('Label already present') }
-            }
-
-            const removeLabel = async () => {
-              try {
-                await github.rest.issues.removeLabel({
-                  owner: context.repo.owner,
-                  repo: context.repo.repo,
-                  issue_number: prNumber,
-                  name: 'PR-changed',
-                })
-                console.log('Removed: PR-changed')
-              } catch (e) { /* not present, fine */ }
-            }
-
-            // ── Push após abertura ou após qualquer momento → adiciona ────
-            if (eventName === 'pull_request' && action === 'synchronize') {
-              await addLabel()
-              return
-            }
-
-            // ── PR aberto → não adiciona (ainda não tem mudança pós-criação)
-            if (eventName === 'pull_request' && action === 'opened') {
-              return
-            }
-
-            // ── Review submetido (aprovado ou reprovado) → remove ─────────
-            if (eventName === 'pull_request_review' && action === 'submitted') {
-              const state = context.payload.review.state // 'approved' | 'changes_requested' | 'commented'
-              if (state === 'approved' || state === 'changes_requested') {
-                await removeLabel()
-              }
-              return
-            }

-name: PR — Review labels
-
-on:
-  pull_request:
-    types: [review_requested, review_request_removed, synchronize]
-  pull_request_review:
-    types: [submitted]
-
-permissions:
-  pull-requests: write
-
-jobs:
-  manage-review-labels:
-    name: Manage review labels
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-
-    steps:
-      - name: Ensure review labels exist
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
-        with:
-          script: |
-            const labels = [
-              { name: 'review-requested', color: 'BFD4F2', description: 'Review has been requested' },
-              { name: 'review-passed',    color: '0E8A16', description: 'PR has been approved' },
-              { name: 'review-failed',    color: 'E11D48', description: 'PR has been rejected (changes requested)' },
-            ]
-            for (const label of labels) {
-              try {
-                await github.rest.issues.createLabel({
-                  owner: context.repo.owner,
-                  repo: context.repo.repo,
-                  ...label
-                })
-              } catch (e) {
-                if (e.status === 422) {
-                  await github.rest.issues.updateLabel({
-                    owner: context.repo.owner,
-                    repo: context.repo.repo,
-                    ...label
-                  })
-                }
-              }
-            }
-
-      - name: Manage review labels
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
-        with:
-          script: |
-            const prNumber = context.payload.pull_request?.number
-              ?? context.payload.review?.pull_request?.number
-
-            const eventName = context.eventName
-            const action = context.payload.action
-
-            console.log('Event:', eventName, action)
-
-            const add = async (label) => {
-              try {
-                await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
-                  owner: context.repo.owner,
-                  repo: context.repo.repo,
-                  issue_number: prNumber,
-                  labels: [label],
-                })
-                console.log('Added:', label)
-              } catch (e) {}
-            }
-
-            const remove = async (label) => {
-              try {
-                await github.rest.issues.removeLabel({
-                  owner: context.repo.owner,
-                  repo: context.repo.repo,
-                  issue_number: prNumber,
-                  name: label,
-                })
-                console.log('Removed:', label)
-              } catch (e) {}
-            }
-
-            // ── Review requisitado ────────────────────────────────────────
-            if (eventName === 'pull_request' && action === 'review_requested') {
-              await add('review-requested')
-              return
-            }
-
-            // ── Review removido sem submissão ─────────────────────────────
-            if (eventName === 'pull_request' && action === 'review_request_removed') {
-              await remove('review-requested')
-              return
-            }
-
-            // ── Push após qualquer estado → reseta tudo (volta ao início) ─
-            if (eventName === 'pull_request' && action === 'synchronize') {
-              await remove('review-passed')
-              await remove('review-failed')
-              await remove('review-requested')
-              return
-            }
-
-            // ── Review submetido ──────────────────────────────────────────
-            if (eventName === 'pull_request_review' && action === 'submitted') {
-              const state = context.payload.review.state
-
-              if (state === 'approved') {
-                await add('review-passed')
-                await remove('review-failed')
-                await remove('review-requested')
-                return
-              }
-
-              if (state === 'changes_requested') {
-                await add('review-failed')
-                await remove('review-passed')
-                await remove('review-requested')
-                return
-              }
-
-              // 'commented' — não altera labels de review
-              console.log('Review comment only — no label change')
-            }

@@ -0,0 +1,95 @@
+name: Release Actions
+
+on:
+  push:
+    tags:
+      - 'v*'
+
+permissions:
+  contents: write
+
+jobs:
+  github-release:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout tagged commit
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          fetch-depth: 0
+
+      - name: Read tag metadata and changelog
+        id: release_data
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          TAG="${GITHUB_REF_NAME}"
+          TAG_MESSAGE=$(git for-each-ref "refs/tags/${TAG}" --format='%(contents)')
+
+          TEST_FLAG=$(printf '%s\n' "$TAG_MESSAGE" | grep '^TEST=' | cut -d= -f2 || true)
+          BUILD_FLAG=$(printf '%s\n' "$TAG_MESSAGE" | grep '^BUILD=' | cut -d= -f2 || true)
+
+          if [ -z "$TEST_FLAG" ]; then TEST_FLAG="false"; fi
+          if [ -z "$BUILD_FLAG" ]; then BUILD_FLAG="build-passed"; fi
+
+          if [ -f .changes/CHANGELOG.md ]; then
+            cp .changes/CHANGELOG.md /tmp/release-body.md
+          else
+            printf '# Release %s - %s - %s\n\n## Changelog\n\n### Major\nNenhuma alteração de impacto major\n\n### Minor\nNenhuma alteração de impacto minor\n\n### Patch\nNenhuma alteração de impacto patch\n' "$TAG" "$(date +%d/%m/%Y)" "$BUILD_FLAG" > /tmp/release-body.md
+          fi
+
+          echo "tag=${TAG}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          echo "test=${TEST_FLAG}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          echo "build=${BUILD_FLAG}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+
+      - name: Create or update GitHub release
+        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        env:
+          TAG_NAME: ${{ steps.release_data.outputs.tag }}
+          TEST_FLAG: ${{ steps.release_data.outputs.test }}
+          BUILD_FLAG: ${{ steps.release_data.outputs.build }}
+        with:
+          script: |
+            const fs = require('fs');
+            const tagName = process.env.TAG_NAME;
+            const test = process.env.TEST_FLAG === 'true';
+            const build = process.env.BUILD_FLAG;
+            const version = tagName.replace(/^v/, '');
+            const date = new Date().toLocaleDateString('pt-BR');
+
+            const body = fs.readFileSync('/tmp/release-body.md', 'utf-8');
+            const releaseName = test
+              ? `#{TEST} Release ${version} - ${date} - ${build}`
+              : `Release ${version} - ${date} - ${build}`;
+
+            let existing = null;
+            try {
+              existing = await github.rest.repos.getReleaseByTag({
+                owner: context.repo.owner,
+                repo: context.repo.repo,
+                tag: tagName,
+              });
+            } catch (error) {
+              if (error.status !== 404) throw error;
+            }
+
+            if (existing?.data?.id) {
+              await github.rest.repos.updateRelease({
+                owner: context.repo.owner,
+                repo: context.repo.repo,
+                release_id: existing.data.id,
+                name: releaseName,
+                body,
+                prerelease: test,
+                draft: false,
+              });
+            } else {
+              await github.rest.repos.createRelease({
+                owner: context.repo.owner,
+                repo: context.repo.repo,
+                tag_name: tagName,
+                name: releaseName,
+                body,
+                prerelease: test,
+                draft: false,
+              });
+            }

@@ -1,120 +0,0 @@
-name: Release
-
-on:
-  pull_request:
-    types: [closed]
-    branches:
-      - master
-
-permissions:
-  contents: write
-  pull-requests: read
-
-jobs:
-  release:
-    name: Bump version and create release
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    if: |
-      github.event.pull_request.merged == true &&
-      !contains(github.event.pull_request.labels.*.name, 'no-release')
-
-    steps:
-      - name: Checkout master
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
-        with:
-          ref: master
-          fetch-depth: 0
-
-      # ─── Lê labels e calcula próxima versão ──────────────────────────────
-      - name: Calculate next version
-        id: version
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
-        with:
-          script: |
-            const labels = context.payload.pull_request.labels.map(l => l.name)
-            console.log('PR labels:', labels)
-
-            const type = labels.includes('major') ? 'major'
-              : labels.includes('minor') ? 'minor'
-              : 'patch'
-
-            const buildPassed = labels.includes('build-passed')
-
-            const fs = require('fs')
-            const pkg = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8'))
-            const current = pkg.version
-            const [major, minor, patch] = current.split('.').map(Number)
-
-            const next = type === 'major' ? `${major + 1}.0.0`
-              : type === 'minor' ? `${major}.${minor + 1}.0`
-              : `${major}.${minor}.${patch + 1}`
-
-            console.log(`${current} → ${next} (${type})`)
-
-            core.setOutput('current', current)
-            core.setOutput('next', next)
-            core.setOutput('type', type)
-            core.setOutput('build_passed', buildPassed ? 'true' : 'false')
-
-      # ─── Atualiza package.json ────────────────────────────────────────────
-      - name: Bump version in package.json
-        run: |
-          NEXT="${{ steps.version.outputs.next }}"
-          node -e "
-            const fs = require('fs')
-            const pkg = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8'))
-            pkg.version = '${NEXT}'
-            fs.writeFileSync('package.json', JSON.stringify(pkg, null, 2) + '\n')
-          "
-          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
-          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
-          git add package.json
-          git commit -m "chore: bump version to ${{ steps.version.outputs.next }}" || echo "Nothing to commit"
-          git push origin master
-
-      # ─── Monta changelog e cria release ──────────────────────────────────
-      # Formato:
-      #   Major:
-      #     - 26320131045: Título do PR
-      - name: Build changelog and create release
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
-        with:
-          script: |
-            const version = '${{ steps.version.outputs.next }}'
-            const type = '${{ steps.version.outputs.type }}'
-            const buildPassed = '${{ steps.version.outputs.build_passed }}' === 'true'
-            const prTitle = context.payload.pull_request.title
-            const branchName = context.payload.pull_request.head.ref
-            const lastCommitSha = context.payload.pull_request.head.sha.substring(0, 7)
-
-            // Usa o nome da branch (timestamp) como ID, fallback para o último commit
-            const identifier = branchName ?? lastCommitSha
-
-            const categoryLabel = type.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + type.slice(1)
-            const changelog = `${categoryLabel}:\n  - ${identifier}: ${prTitle}`
-
-            const typeEmoji = { major: '🚨', minor: '✨', patch: '🔧' }[type] ?? '📦'
-            const buildLine = buildPassed ? '✅ Build passed' : '❌ Build failed'
-
-            const body = [
-              `${buildLine}`,
-              `**Type:** ${typeEmoji} \`${type}\``,
-              '',
-              '### Changelog',
-              '',
-              '```',
-              changelog,
-              '```',
-            ].join('\n')
-
-            const { data: release } = await github.rest.repos.createRelease({
-              owner: context.repo.owner,
-              repo: context.repo.repo,
-              tag_name: `v${version}`,
-              name: `v${version}: ${prTitle}`,
-              body,
-              prerelease: !buildPassed,
-              draft: false,
-            })
-
-            console.log('Release created:', release.html_url)

@@ -0,0 +1,54 @@
+name: NPMJS Release
+
+on:
+  release:
+    types: [published]
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+jobs:
+  publish:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    if: github.event.release.draft == false
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout release tag
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          ref: ${{ github.event.release.tag_name }}
+
+      - name: Setup Node
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: 22
+          registry-url: https://registry.npmjs.org
+
+      - name: Setup pnpm
+        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
+        with:
+          version: 10
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile
+
+      - name: Build package
+        run: pnpm build
+
+      - name: Publish to npmjs
+        env:
+          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
+          RELEASE_NAME: ${{ github.event.release.name }}
+          RELEASE_PRERELEASE: ${{ github.event.release.prerelease }}
+        run: |
+          if [ -z "$NODE_AUTH_TOKEN" ]; then
+            echo "NPM_TOKEN is not configured"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+          TAG="latest"
+          if [ "$RELEASE_PRERELEASE" = "true" ] || echo "$RELEASE_NAME" | grep -q '#{TEST}'; then
+            TAG="test"
+          fi
+
+          npm publish --access public --tag "$TAG"

@@ -0,0 +1,95 @@
+name: Release Actions
+
+on:
+  push:
+    tags:
+      - 'v*'
+
+permissions:
+  contents: write
+
+jobs:
+  github-release:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout tagged commit
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          fetch-depth: 0
+
+      - name: Read tag metadata and changelog
+        id: release_data
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          TAG="${GITHUB_REF_NAME}"
+          TAG_MESSAGE=$(git for-each-ref "refs/tags/${TAG}" --format='%(contents)')
+
+          TEST_FLAG=$(printf '%s\n' "$TAG_MESSAGE" | grep '^TEST=' | cut -d= -f2 || true)
+          BUILD_FLAG=$(printf '%s\n' "$TAG_MESSAGE" | grep '^BUILD=' | cut -d= -f2 || true)
+
+          if [ -z "$TEST_FLAG" ]; then TEST_FLAG="false"; fi
+          if [ -z "$BUILD_FLAG" ]; then BUILD_FLAG="build-passed"; fi
+
+          if [ -f .changes/CHANGELOG.md ]; then
+            cp .changes/CHANGELOG.md /tmp/release-body.md
+          else
+            printf '# Release %s - %s - %s\n\n## Changelog\n\n### Major\nNenhuma alteração de impacto major\n\n### Minor\nNenhuma alteração de impacto minor\n\n### Patch\nNenhuma alteração de impacto patch\n' "$TAG" "$(date +%d/%m/%Y)" "$BUILD_FLAG" > /tmp/release-body.md
+          fi
+
+          echo "tag=${TAG}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          echo "test=${TEST_FLAG}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          echo "build=${BUILD_FLAG}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+
+      - name: Create or update GitHub release
+        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        env:
+          TAG_NAME: ${{ steps.release_data.outputs.tag }}
+          TEST_FLAG: ${{ steps.release_data.outputs.test }}
+          BUILD_FLAG: ${{ steps.release_data.outputs.build }}
+        with:
+          script: |
+            const fs = require('fs');
+            const tagName = process.env.TAG_NAME;
+            const test = process.env.TEST_FLAG === 'true';
+            const build = process.env.BUILD_FLAG;
+            const version = tagName.replace(/^v/, '');
+            const date = new Date().toLocaleDateString('pt-BR');
+
+            const body = fs.readFileSync('/tmp/release-body.md', 'utf-8');
+            const releaseName = test
+              ? `#{TEST} Release ${version} - ${date} - ${build}`
+              : `Release ${version} - ${date} - ${build}`;
+
+            let existing = null;
+            try {
+              existing = await github.rest.repos.getReleaseByTag({
+                owner: context.repo.owner,
+                repo: context.repo.repo,
+                tag: tagName,
+              });
+            } catch (error) {
+              if (error.status !== 404) throw error;
+            }
+
+            if (existing?.data?.id) {
+              await github.rest.repos.updateRelease({
+                owner: context.repo.owner,
+                repo: context.repo.repo,
+                release_id: existing.data.id,
+                name: releaseName,
+                body,
+                prerelease: test,
+                draft: false,
+              });
+            } else {
+              await github.rest.repos.createRelease({
+                owner: context.repo.owner,
+                repo: context.repo.repo,
+                tag_name: tagName,
+                name: releaseName,
+                body,
+                prerelease: test,
+                draft: false,
+              });
+            }

-name: Release
-
-on:
-  pull_request:
-    types: [closed]
-    branches:
-      - master
-
-permissions:
-  contents: write
-  pull-requests: read
-
-jobs:
-  release:
-    name: Bump version and create release
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    if: |
-      github.event.pull_request.merged == true &&
-      !contains(github.event.pull_request.labels.*.name, 'no-release')
-
-    steps:
-      - name: Checkout master
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
-        with:
-          ref: master
-          fetch-depth: 0
-
-      # ─── Lê labels e calcula próxima versão ──────────────────────────────
-      - name: Calculate next version
-        id: version
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
-        with:
-          script: |
-            const labels = context.payload.pull_request.labels.map(l => l.name)
-            console.log('PR labels:', labels)
-
-            const type = labels.includes('major') ? 'major'
-              : labels.includes('minor') ? 'minor'
-              : 'patch'
-
-            const buildPassed = labels.includes('build-passed')
-
-            const fs = require('fs')
-            const pkg = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8'))
-            const current = pkg.version
-            const [major, minor, patch] = current.split('.').map(Number)
-
-            const next = type === 'major' ? `${major + 1}.0.0`
-              : type === 'minor' ? `${major}.${minor + 1}.0`
-              : `${major}.${minor}.${patch + 1}`
-
-            console.log(`${current} → ${next} (${type})`)
-
-            core.setOutput('current', current)
-            core.setOutput('next', next)
-            core.setOutput('type', type)
-            core.setOutput('build_passed', buildPassed ? 'true' : 'false')
-
-      # ─── Atualiza package.json ────────────────────────────────────────────
-      - name: Bump version in package.json
-        run: |
-          NEXT="${{ steps.version.outputs.next }}"
-          node -e "
-            const fs = require('fs')
-            const pkg = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8'))
-            pkg.version = '${NEXT}'
-            fs.writeFileSync('package.json', JSON.stringify(pkg, null, 2) + '\n')
-          "
-          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
-          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
-          git add package.json
-          git commit -m "chore: bump version to ${{ steps.version.outputs.next }}" || echo "Nothing to commit"
-          git push origin master
-
-      # ─── Monta changelog e cria release ──────────────────────────────────
-      # Formato:
-      #   Major:
-      #     - 26320131045: Título do PR
-      - name: Build changelog and create release
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
-        with:
-          script: |
-            const version = '${{ steps.version.outputs.next }}'
-            const type = '${{ steps.version.outputs.type }}'
-            const buildPassed = '${{ steps.version.outputs.build_passed }}' === 'true'
-            const prTitle = context.payload.pull_request.title
-            const branchName = context.payload.pull_request.head.ref
-            const lastCommitSha = context.payload.pull_request.head.sha.substring(0, 7)
-
-            // Usa o nome da branch (timestamp) como ID, fallback para o último commit
-            const identifier = branchName ?? lastCommitSha
-
-            const categoryLabel = type.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + type.slice(1)
-            const changelog = `${categoryLabel}:\n  - ${identifier}: ${prTitle}`
-
-            const typeEmoji = { major: '🚨', minor: '✨', patch: '🔧' }[type] ?? '📦'
-            const buildLine = buildPassed ? '✅ Build passed' : '❌ Build failed'
-
-            const body = [
-              `${buildLine}`,
-              `**Type:** ${typeEmoji} \`${type}\``,
-              '',
-              '### Changelog',
-              '',
-              '```',
-              changelog,
-              '```',
-            ].join('\n')
-
-            const { data: release } = await github.rest.repos.createRelease({
-              owner: context.repo.owner,
-              repo: context.repo.repo,
-              tag_name: `v${version}`,
-              name: `v${version}: ${prTitle}`,
-              body,
-              prerelease: !buildPassed,
-              draft: false,
-            })
-
-            console.log('Release created:', release.html_url)
